data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for lifecycle timestamps.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of lifecycle timestamps (open/acknowledged/resolved/waived/dismissed) but did not provide any concrete evidence to confirm their existence or coverage. The prior steps and linked use cases do not explicitly mention or demonstrate the required lifecycle timestamps, leading to an inconclusive status. Without specific evidence or data points related to these timestamps, the requirement cannot be validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of lifecycle timestamps.
